Launch App

Engineered for
Absolute Certainty.

A protocol engineered to replace human trust with unyielding cryptography. Built for institutions, accessible to everyone.

99.99% Uptime IPFS Distributed
Platform Architecture

Complete Control Over Your Assets.

Zero-Knowledge Architecture

End-to-end client-side AES-256-GCM encryption ensures your payloads are mathematically inaccessible to our infrastructure before they even reach IPFS.

Read Encryption Specs

Shamir Secret Sharing

No single point of failure. Your master decryption key is mathematically fragmented via GF(2^8) polynomials and requires a threshold (e.g., 3-of-5) of your beneficiaries to reassemble.

Autonomous Execution

Immutable smart contracts on the Polygon network track your cryptographic heartbeats. If the temporal decay timer reaches zero, the contract acts seamlessly, unlocking the ciphertext URI.

View Contract ABI
function releaseVault(uint256 vaultId) external {
  Vault storage v = vaults[vaultId];
  require(block.timestamp > v.unlockTime, "Not ready");
  v.status = Status.RELEASED;
  emit VaultReleased(vaultId, v.ipfsCID);
}

Mathematically Proven.

The smart contracts governing the Digital Will Protocol are fully open-source and have undergone rigorous, multi-month formal verification and audits by elite Web3 security firms.

Halborn Audited
EIP-4361 Auth
No Backend Secrets
100% Open Source

Deploy Your Vault Today.

No credit card required. Pay gas only.

Digital Will Protocol

Securing digital legacies for the decentralized future. Your assets, your rules.
